text: The robotic arm is maneuvered to insert a scope into the abdomen, guided by etchings and marks that indicate the depth of insertion. The robot reads these markings to confirm the introduction of a trocar. An example of an instrument, such as a metembalm or scissor, is shown.

The surgical team introduces a green-coded instrument for heat coagulation and cutting, which is recognized by the system within seconds. The robotic trochar is oriented towards the gallbladder, with multiple monitors displaying the procedure for the team.
